conservative.name: Inferno of U'zhul
conservative.requirements: 6 power. You must have at least one other Bright Order spell recharging. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: The flickering flames of all your Bright Order spells rekindle and flare into a mighty inferno. You strike the target for 4+ Intelligence damage, +1 damage for each of your Bright Order spells (aside from this one) that is currently recharging

bane.description: Suffer 1 wound per Bright Order spell you have currently recharging (aside from this one)

sigmarsComet.description: Reveal critical wounds from the top of the wound deck until their total severity exceeds the number of Bright Order spells currently recharging. Discard the last such wound card revealed and apply the rest as critical wounds to the target.

reckless.name: Inferno of U'zhul
reckless.requirements: 6 power. You must have at least one other Bright Order spell recharging. I you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: The flickering flames of all your Bright Order spells rekindle and flare into a mighty inferno. You strike the target for Intelligence damage, +1 damage for each recharge token on each of your Bright Order spells aside from this one

sigmarsComet.description: Before resolving this spell, add 1 recharge token to each of your currently recharging Bright Order actions
After resolving this spell, remove 1 recharge token from each of your currently recharging Bright Order actions
